title: Seeking Visions
description: The Priest of Chronos invites you to meditate at the temple and seek visions from the Timekeeper. These glimpses into past, present, or future are gifts to the faithful - fragments of knowledge that Chronos deems worthy of sharing. Return when you seek wisdom, and the hourglass may reveal its secrets.

objectives.description: Meditate at the Temple of Three Gods

notes: DESIGN INTENT: Repeatable weekly quest for devotees. Low rewards but provides ongoing engagement with the Chronos storyline. Each meditation triggers a random vision - these can be used to deliver lore, hint at future content, or provide atmospheric flavor. The visions could include: prophecies about world events, glimpses of NPC backstories, hints about hidden treasures, or warnings about dangers. The 7-day cooldown prevents farming while allowing regular interaction. This keeps the Chronos questline alive even after completion of the main chain. The minor time blessing is a small consumable buff (increased movement speed or dodge chance for 10 minutes).
